name: Kaesmus- Rallenmus (Cheese Mush)
recipeIngredient: 1/2 liter mixture of milk and water (1 pint)
recipeInstructions:
1. Combine the flour, egg, and salt to form a dough.
2. In a skillet or saucepan, bring the milk mixture to a boil.
3. Whisk in the dough and grated cheese.
4. In a separate skillet, brown the onion in clarified butter.
5. Pour the contents of the skillet over the cheese mixture.
6. Season with pepper to taste.
Serves 4.
